absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: verify every installed module has a manifest, entrypoint, and declared version
report unsatisfied capabilities and missing configured modules
public_purpose: Validates the installed System Zero registry, manifests, capabilities, and config.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: Import-safe alias for the hyphenated registry-validator script.
